(*****************************************************************************

 Every display map bicategory gives rise to a displayed bicategory

 *****************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Logic.DisplayMapBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section ArrowSubBicatToDispBicat.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (D : arrow_subbicat B).

  Definition disp_map_bicat_ob
             (y : B)
    : UU
    := ∑ (x : B) (h : x --> y), pred_ob D h.

  Definition make_disp_map_bicat_ob
             {x y : B}
             (h : x --> y)
             (H : pred_ob D h)
    : disp_map_bicat_ob y
    := (x ,, h ,, H).

  Definition disp_map_bicat_mor
             {y₁ y₂ : B}
             (h₁ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₁)
             (h₂ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₂)
             (g : y₁ --> y₂)
    : UU
    := ∑ (f : pr1 h₁ --> pr1 h₂),
       pred_mor D (pr12 h₁) (pr12 h₂) f
       ×
       invertible_2cell (pr12 h₁ · g) (f · pr12 h₂).

  Definition make_disp_map_bicat_mor
             {y₁ y₂ : B}
             {h₁ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₁}
             {h₂ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₂}
             (g : y₁ --> y₂)
             (f : pr1 h₁ --> pr1 h₂)
             (H : pred_mor D (pr12 h₁) (pr12 h₂) f)
             (γ : invertible_2cell (pr12 h₁ · g) (f · pr12 h₂))
    : disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g
    := (f ,, H ,, γ).

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_cat_ob_mor B

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_cat_ob_mor B

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
B → UU
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
(λ obd : B → UU,
 ∏ x y : B, obd x → obd y → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
B → UU
 exact disp_map_bicat_ob.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
(λ obd : B → UU,
 ∏ x y : B, obd x → obd y → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  disp_map_bicat_ob
 exact (λ _ _, disp_map_bicat_mor).
  Defined.

disp_cat_id_comp B disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor x),

pred_mor D (pr12 h) (pr12 h) ?f
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y: B
h: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y
invertible_2cell (pr12 h · id₁ y) (?f · pr12 h)

D: arrow_subbicat B
y: B
h: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y
B ⟦ pr1 h, pr1 h ⟧
 exact (id₁ _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y: B
h: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y
pred_mor D (pr12 h) (pr12 h) (id₁ (pr1 h))
 apply id_pred_mor.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y: B
h: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y
invertible_2cell (pr12 h · id₁ y)
  (id₁ (pr1 h) · pr12 h)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
h₁ -->[ g₁ · g₂] h₃

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
B ⟦ pr1 h₁, pr1 h₃ ⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
pred_mor D (pr12 h₁) (pr12 h₃) ?f
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
invertible_2cell (pr12 h₁ · (g₁ · g₂)) (?f · pr12 h₃)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
B ⟦ pr1 h₁, pr1 h₃ ⟧
 exact (pr1 f₁ · pr1 f₂).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
pred_mor D (pr12 h₁) (pr12 h₃) (pr1 f₁ · pr1 f₂)
 exact (comp_pred_mor
                 D
                 (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂)).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂, y₃: B
g₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
h₁: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₂
h₃: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor y₃
f₁: h₁ -->[ g₁] h₂
f₂: h₂ -->[ g₂] h₃
invertible_2cell (pr12 h₁ · (g₁ · g₂))
  (pr1 f₁ · pr1 f₂ · pr12 h₃)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ (pr22 f₁))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ (pr22 f₂))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))))).
  Defined.

  Definition disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_data
    : disp_cat_data B
    := (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_ob_mor ,, disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_id_comp).

  Definition disp_map_bicat_cell
             {y₁ y₂ : B}
             {g₁ g₂ : y₁ --> y₂}
             {h₁ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₁}
             {h₂ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₂}
             (f₁ : disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁)
             (f₂ : disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂)
             (β : g₁ ==> g₂)
    : UU
    := ∑ (α : pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂),
       pr122 f₁ • (α ▹ _)
       =
       (_ ◃ β) • pr122 f₂.

  Definition make_disp_map_bicat_cell
             {y₁ y₂ : B}
             {g₁ g₂ : y₁ --> y₂}
             {β : g₁ ==> g₂}
             {h₁ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₁}
             {h₂ : disp_map_bicat_ob y₂}
             {f₁ : disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁}
             {f₂ : disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂}
             (α : pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂)
             (p : pr122 f₁ • (α ▹ _)
                  =
                  (_ ◃ β) • pr122 f₂)
    : disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β
    := (α ,, p).

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells B

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_2cell_struct disp_map_bicat_to_disp_cat_data

    exact (λ y₁ y₂ g₁ g₂ β h₁ h₂ f₁ f₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_ops
  disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_ops
  disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
disp_map_bicat_cell hf hf (id₂ f)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1 hf ==> pr1 hf
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (?α ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 hf

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1 hf ==> pr1 hf
 exact (id2 _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (id₂ (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 hf
 abstract
          (rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
     (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
        (pr12 hf))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
           (id₁ x) f)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx))))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy)))))))
  hf (lunitor f)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
     (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
        (pr12 hf))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
           (id₁ x) f)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx))))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy))))))) ==>
pr1 hf
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
         (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
         (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
            (pr12 hf))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
               (id₁ x) f)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 hx))
                     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 hx))))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf)
                        (pr12 hy)))))))
• (?α ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ lunitor f) • pr122 hf

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
     (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
        (pr12 hf))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
           (id₁ x) f)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx))))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                 (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy))))))) ==>
pr1 hf
 exact (lunitor _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
         (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
         (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
            (pr12 hf))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
               (id₁ x) f)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 hx))
                     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 hx))))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf)
                        (pr12 hy)))))))
• (lunitor (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ lunitor f) • pr122 hf
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- linvunitor_assoc ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           apply id2_left).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y), f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
     (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
        (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) f
           (id₁ y))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ y)
              (pr22 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf)
                 (pr12 hy) (id₁ y))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf) (id₁ (pr1 hy)) (pr12 hy)))))))
  hf (runitor f)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
         (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
         (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
            (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))

                  (pr22 hf))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                        (pr12 hy)))))))
• (runitor (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =

 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           exact (!(left_unit_assoc _ _))).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
disp_map_bicat_cell hf
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
     (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
        (pr12 hf))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
           (id₁ x) f)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx))))

                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy)))))))
  (linvunitor f)

D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (?α ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ linvunitor f)
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
           (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
           (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
              (pr12 hf))

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1 hf ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
     (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
     (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
        (pr12 hf))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
           (id₁ x) f)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx))))

 exact (linvunitor _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (linvunitor (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ linvunitor f)
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x · f)
           (id₁ (pr1 hx) · pr1 hf)
           (comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
              (pr12 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
                 (id₁ x) f)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hx))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hx))))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr12 hx) f)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr22 hf))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (id₁ (pr1 hx)) (pr1 hf)
                          (pr12 hy)))))))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite <- linvunitor_assoc ;
           rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
           rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
disp_map_bicat_cell hf
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
     (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
        (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) f
           (id₁ y))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ y)
              (pr22 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf)
                 (pr12 hy) (id₁ y))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf) (id₁ (pr1 hy)) (pr12 hy)))))))
  (rinvunitor f)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (?α ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ rinvunitor f)
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
           (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
              (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
                 f (id₁ y))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ y)
                    (pr22 hf))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy) (id₁ y))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf)
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr12 hy))
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr12 hy))))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf) (id₁ (pr1 hy))
                          (pr12 hy)))))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr1 hf ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
     (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
        (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) f
           (id₁ y))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ y)
              (pr22 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf)
                 (pr12 hy) (id₁ y))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hy))))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf) (id₁ (pr1 hy)) (pr12 hy)))))))
 exact (rinvunitor _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx hy f
pr122 hf • (rinvunitor (pr1 hf) ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ rinvunitor f)
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · id₁ y)
           (pr1 hf · id₁ (pr1 hy))
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
              (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hy)))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
                 f (id₁ y))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ y)
                    (pr22 hf))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf) (pr12 hy) (id₁ y))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf)
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr12 hy))
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr12 hy))))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf) (id₁ (pr1 hy))
                          (pr12 hy)))))))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_hcomp ;
           rewrite triangle_l_inv ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_hcomp, <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           refine (!(id2_left _) @ _) ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;

           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite <- left_unit_assoc ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄: B
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hx₄: disp_map_bicat_ob x₄
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hk: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₃ hx₄ k
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · g · k)
     (pr1 hf · pr1 hg · pr1 hk)
     (comp_pred_mor D
        (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf) (pr12 hg))
        (pr12 hk))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
           (f · g) k)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell k
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx₁) f g)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                       (pr22 hf))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             (pr1 hf) (pr22 hg))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg)
                             (pr12 hx₃)))))))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                 (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃) k)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr22 hk))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr1 hk)
                    (pr12 hx₄)))))))
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · (g · k))
     (pr1 hf · (pr1 hg · pr1 hk))
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
        (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hg) (pr12 hk)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f
           (g · k))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (g · k)
              (pr22 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf)
                 (pr12 hx₂) (g · k))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hx₂) g k)
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             k (pr22 hg))
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                                (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃) k)
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   (pr1 hg) (pr22 hk))
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                   (pr1 hg) (pr1 hk)
                                   (pr12 hx₄)))))))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg · pr1 hk)
                    (pr12 hx₄)))))))
  (rassociator f g k)

                                      (pr12 hx₃) k)

                                      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                         (pr1 hg)
                                         (pr22 hk))
                                      (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                         (pr1 hg)
                                         (pr1 hk)
                                         (pr12 hx₄)))))))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg · pr1 hk)
                          (pr12 hx₄)))))))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp, <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- lassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- lwhisker_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- lassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           apply id2_right).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells d)
(ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄: B
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hx₄: disp_map_bicat_ob x₄
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hk: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₃ hx₄ k
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · (g · k))
     (pr1 hf · (pr1 hg · pr1 hk))
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf)
        (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hg) (pr12 hk)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f
           (g · k))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (g · k)
              (pr22 hf))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf)
                 (pr12 hx₂) (g · k))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr12 hx₂) g k)
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             k (pr22 hg))
                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                                (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃) k)
                             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                   (pr1 hg) (pr22 hk))
                                (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                                   (pr1 hg) (pr1 hk)
                                   (pr12 hx₄)))))))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg · pr1 hk)
                    (pr12 hx₄)))))))
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f · g · k)
     (pr1 hf · pr1 hg · pr1 hk)
     (comp_pred_mor D
        (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf) (pr12 hg))
        (pr12 hk))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
           (f · g) k)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell k
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 hx₁) f g)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                       (pr22 hf))
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                       (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                             (pr1 hf) (pr22 hg))
                          (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                             (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg)
                             (pr12 hx₃)))))))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                 (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃) k)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr22 hk))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf · pr1 hg) (pr1 hk)
                    (pr12 hx₄)))))))
  (lassociator f g k)

          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp, <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
