B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ h
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf hg α
hβ: disp_map_bicat_cell hg hh β
disp_map_bicat_cell hf hh (α • β)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ h
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf hg α
hβ: disp_map_bicat_cell hg hh β
pr1 hf ==> pr1 hh
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ h
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf hg α
hβ: disp_map_bicat_cell hg hh β
pr122 hf • (?α ▹ pr12 hx₂) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (α • β)) • pr122 hh

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ h
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf hg α
hβ: disp_map_bicat_cell hg hh β
pr1 hf ==> pr1 hh
 exact (pr1 hα • pr1 hβ).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hf: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ h
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf hg α
hβ: disp_map_bicat_cell hg hh β
pr122 hf • ((pr1 hα • pr1 hβ) ▹ pr12 hx₂) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (α • β)) • pr122 hh
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite (pr2 hα) ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite (pr2 hβ) ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₂ ==> g
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₂ hg α
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · f₂)
     (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hf₂)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hf₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ f₂)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f₂ (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) f₂)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hf₂))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
  (f₁ ◃ α)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₂ ==> g
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₂ hg α
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · f₂)
     (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hf₂)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hf₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ f₂)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f₂ (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) f₂)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hf₂))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₃))))))) ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₂ ==> g
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₂ hg α
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · f₂)
         (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hf₂)
         (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hf₂))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
               f₁ f₂)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f₂
                  (pr22 hf₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) f₂)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hf₂))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
• (?α ▹ pr12 hx₃) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (f₁ ◃ α))
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g)
           (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
                 f₁ g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                    (pr22 hf₁))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg)
                          (pr12 hx₃)))))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₂ ==> g
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₂ hg α
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · f₂)
     (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hf₂)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hf₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ f₂)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f₂ (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) f₂)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hf₂))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₃))))))) ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
 exact (_ ◃ pr1 hα).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₂ ==> g
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₂ hg α
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · f₂)
         (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hf₂)
         (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hf₂))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
               f₁ f₂)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell f₂
                  (pr22 hf₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) f₂)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hf₂))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
• ((pr1 hf₁ ◃ pr1 hα) ▹ pr12 hx₃) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (f₁ ◃ α))
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g)
           (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
                 f₁ g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                    (pr22 hf₁))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg)
                          (pr12 hx₃)))))))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite lwhisker_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- vcomp_whisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite <- lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact (pr2 hα)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2)
(x : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₁ hf₂ α
disp_map_bicat_cell
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₂ · g) (pr1 hf₂ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₂) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₂ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₂)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
  (α ▹ g)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₁ hf₂ α
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃))))))) ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₂ · g) (pr1 hf₂ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₂) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₂ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₂)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₁ hf₂ α
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g)
         (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
         (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
               f₁ g)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                  (pr22 hf₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
• (?α ▹ pr12 hx₃) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (α ▹ g))
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₂ · g)
           (pr1 hf₂ · pr1 hg)
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₂) (pr12 hg))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
                 f₂ g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                    (pr22 hf₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₂) (pr22 hg))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₂) (pr1 hg)
                          (pr12 hx₃)))))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₁ hf₂ α
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g) (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₁ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₁)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃))))))) ==>
pr1
  (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₂ · g) (pr1 hf₂ · pr1 hg)
     (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₂) (pr12 hg))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁) f₂ g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g (pr22 hf₂))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 hf₂)
                 (pr12 hx₂) g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr22 hg))
                 (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                    (pr1 hf₂) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
 exact (pr1 hα ▹ _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
hx₁: disp_map_bicat_ob x₁
hx₂: disp_map_bicat_ob x₂
hx₃: disp_map_bicat_ob x₃
hf₁: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₁
hf₂: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₁ hx₂ f₂
hg: disp_map_bicat_mor hx₂ hx₃ g
hα: disp_map_bicat_cell hf₁ hf₂ α
pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₁ · g)
         (pr1 hf₁ · pr1 hg)
         (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₁) (pr12 hg))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
               f₁ g)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                  (pr22 hf₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                     (pr1 hf₁) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr22 hg))
                     (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                        (pr1 hf₁) (pr1 hg) (pr12 hx₃)))))))
• ((pr1 hα ▹ pr1 hg) ▹ pr12 hx₃) =
(pr12 hx₁ ◃ (α ▹ g))
• pr122 (make_disp_map_bicat_mor (f₂ · g)
           (pr1 hf₂ · pr1 hg)
           (comp_pred_mor D (pr12 hf₂) (pr12 hg))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx₁)
                 f₂ g)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g
                    (pr22 hf₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       (pr1 hf₂) (pr12 hx₂) g)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₂) (pr22 hg))
                       (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                          (pr1 hf₂) (pr1 hg)
                          (pr12 hx₃)))))))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite <- vcomp_whisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact (pr2 hα)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: β₁ = β₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₁
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α) p
     γ) = pr1 γ

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: β₁ = β₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₁
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α) p
     γ) = pr1 γ

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₁
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α)
     (idpath β₁) γ) = pr1 γ

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: β₁ = β₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₂
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α) p
     γ) = pr1 γ

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: β₁ = β₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₂
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α) p
     γ) = pr1 γ

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
y₁, y₂: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
β₁: g₁ ==> g₂
h₁: disp_map_bicat_ob y₁
h₂: disp_map_bicat_ob y₂
f₁: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₁
f₂: disp_map_bicat_mor h₁ h₂ g₂
γ: disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ β₁
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, disp_map_bicat_cell f₁ f₂ α)
     (idpath β₁) γ) = pr1 γ

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_data
    : disp_prebicat_data B
    := (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
        ,,
        disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_ops).

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_laws
  disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_data

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_prebicat_laws
  disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_data

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
id₂ (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη = pr1 ηη
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
pr1 ηη • id₂ (pr1 gg) = pr1 ηη
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g, h, k: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
kk: disp_map_bicat_mor x y k
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh φ
ψψ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh kk ψ
pr1 ηη • (pr1 φφ • pr1 ψψ) =
(pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ) • pr1 ψψ
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
pr1 ff ◃ id₂ (pr1 gg) = id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
id₂ (pr1 ff) ▹ pr1 gg = id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii φ
(pr1 ff ◃ pr1 ηη) • (pr1 ff ◃ pr1 φφ) =
pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh φ
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii) • (pr1 φφ ▹ pr1 ii) =
(pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ) ▹ pr1 ii
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
(id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ pr1 ηη) • lunitor (pr1 gg) =
lunitor (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
(pr1 ηη ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)) • runitor (pr1 gg) =
runitor (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii η
(pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 gg ◃ pr1 ηη))
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• (pr1 ff · pr1 gg ◃ pr1 ηη)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: g ==> h
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh η
(pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii))
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii)
• ((pr1 ff ◃ pr1 ηη) ▹ pr1 ii)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: f ==> g
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor w x g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
• ((pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh) ▹ pr1 ii) =
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh · pr1 ii)
• lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii φ
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh) • (pr1 gg ◃ pr1 φφ) =
(pr1 ff ◃ pr1 φφ) • (pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
lunitor (pr1 ff) • linvunitor (pr1 ff) =
id₂ (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 ff)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
linvunitor (pr1 ff) • lunitor (pr1 ff) = id₂ (pr1 ff)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
runitor (pr1 ff) • rinvunitor (pr1 ff) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · id₁ (pr1 y))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
rinvunitor (pr1 ff) • runitor (pr1 ff) = id₂ (pr1 ff)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · (pr1 gg · pr1 hh))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg · pr1 hh)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
lassociator (pr1 ff) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 gg)
• (runitor (pr1 ff) ▹ pr1 gg) =
pr1 ff ◃ lunitor (pr1 gg)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: disp_map_bicat_ob a
w: disp_map_bicat_ob b
x: disp_map_bicat_ob c
y: disp_map_bicat_ob d
z: disp_map_bicat_ob e
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor v w f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor w x g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
((pr1 ff ◃ lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
 • lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg · pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
• (lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) ▹ pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh · pr1 ii)
• lassociator (pr1 ff · pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
id₂ (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη = pr1 ηη
 apply id2_left.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
pr1 ηη • id₂ (pr1 gg) = pr1 ηη
 apply id2_right.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g, h, k: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
kk: disp_map_bicat_mor x y k
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh φ
ψψ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh kk ψ
pr1 ηη • (pr1 φφ • pr1 ψψ) =
(pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ) • pr1 ψψ
 apply vassocr.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
pr1 ff ◃ id₂ (pr1 gg) = id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg)
 apply lwhisker_id2.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
id₂ (pr1 ff) ▹ pr1 gg = id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg)
 apply id2_rwhisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii φ
(pr1 ff ◃ pr1 ηη) • (pr1 ff ◃ pr1 φφ) =
pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ)
 apply lwhisker_vcomp.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh φ
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii) • (pr1 φφ ▹ pr1 ii) =
(pr1 ηη • pr1 φφ) ▹ pr1 ii
 apply rwhisker_vcomp.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
(id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ pr1 ηη) • lunitor (pr1 gg) =
lunitor (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη
 apply vcomp_lunitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
(pr1 ηη ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)) • runitor (pr1 gg) =
runitor (pr1 ff) • pr1 ηη
 apply vcomp_runitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii η
(pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 gg ◃ pr1 ηη))
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• (pr1 ff · pr1 gg ◃ pr1 ηη)
 apply lwhisker_lwhisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: g ==> h
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell gg hh η
(pr1 ff ◃ (pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii))
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii)
• ((pr1 ff ◃ pr1 ηη) ▹ pr1 ii)
 apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: f ==> g
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor w x g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
• ((pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh) ▹ pr1 ii) =
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh · pr1 ii)
• lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
 apply rwhisker_rwhisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
ηη: disp_map_bicat_cell ff gg η
φφ: disp_map_bicat_cell hh ii φ
(pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 hh) • (pr1 gg ◃ pr1 φφ) =
(pr1 ff ◃ pr1 φφ) • (pr1 ηη ▹ pr1 ii)
 apply vcomp_whisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
lunitor (pr1 ff) • linvunitor (pr1 ff) =
id₂ (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 ff)
 apply lunitor_linvunitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
linvunitor (pr1 ff) • lunitor (pr1 ff) = id₂ (pr1 ff)
 apply linvunitor_lunitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
runitor (pr1 ff) • rinvunitor (pr1 ff) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · id₁ (pr1 y))
 apply runitor_rinvunitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
rinvunitor (pr1 ff) • runitor (pr1 ff) = id₂ (pr1 ff)
 apply rinvunitor_runitor.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · (pr1 gg · pr1 hh))
 apply lassociator_rassociator.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: disp_map_bicat_ob a
x: disp_map_bicat_ob b
y: disp_map_bicat_ob c
z: disp_map_bicat_ob d
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor w x f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor x y g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor y z h
rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
• lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) =
id₂ (pr1 ff · pr1 gg · pr1 hh)
 apply rassociator_lassociator.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: disp_map_bicat_ob a
y: disp_map_bicat_ob b
z: disp_map_bicat_ob c
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor x y f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor y z g
lassociator (pr1 ff) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 gg)
• (runitor (pr1 ff) ▹ pr1 gg) =
pr1 ff ◃ lunitor (pr1 gg)
 apply runitor_rwhisker.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: disp_map_bicat_ob a
w: disp_map_bicat_ob b
x: disp_map_bicat_ob c
y: disp_map_bicat_ob d
z: disp_map_bicat_ob e
ff: disp_map_bicat_mor v w f
gg: disp_map_bicat_mor w x g
hh: disp_map_bicat_mor x y h
ii: disp_map_bicat_mor y z i
((pr1 ff ◃ lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
 • lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg · pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
• (lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) ▹ pr1 ii) =
lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh · pr1 ii)
• lassociator (pr1 ff · pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
 apply lassociator_lassociator.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat
    : disp_prebicat B
    := (disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_data
        ,,
        disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat_laws).

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_bicat B

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
disp_bicat B

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
has_disp_cellset disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaset (ff ==>[ x] gg)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaset (pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
isaset
  ((λ x1 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
    pr122 ff • (x1 ▹ pr12 bb) =
    (pr12 aa ◃ x) • pr122 gg) x0)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaset (pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg)
 apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
isaset
  ((λ x1 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
    pr122 ff • (x1 ▹ pr12 bb) =
    (pr12 aa ◃ x) • pr122 gg) x0)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x0: pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg
isaset
  ((λ x0 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
    pr122 ff • (x0 ▹ pr12 bb) =
    (pr12 aa ◃ x) • pr122 gg) x0)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat a
bb: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_prebicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x0: pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg
isaprop
  (pr122 ff • (x0 ▹ pr12 bb) =
   (pr12 aa ◃ x) • pr122 gg)

      apply cellset_property.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
isaprop (ff ==>[ α] gg)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
isProofIrrelevant (ff ==>[ α] gg)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
αα = ββ

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
   pr122 ff • (x0 ▹ pr12 yy) =
   (pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr122 gg)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
pr1 αα = pr1 ββ

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg,
   pr122 ff • (x0 ▹ pr12 yy) =
   (pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr122 gg)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
x0: pr1 ff ==> pr1 gg
isaprop
  (pr122 ff • (x0 ▹ pr12 yy) =
   (pr12 xx ◃ α) • pr122 gg)

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
pr1 αα = pr1 ββ

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
pr1 αα ▹ pr12 yy = pr1 ββ ▹ pr12 yy

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: contained_in_faithful D
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
xx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
yy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα, ββ: ff ==>[ α] gg
pr22 ff • (pr1 αα ▹ pr12 yy) =
pr22 ff • (pr1 ββ ▹ pr12 yy)

    exact (pr2 αα @ !(pr2 ββ)).
  Qed.

  (** Displayed invertible 2-cells *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
hg ==>[ Hα ^-1] hf
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
αα •• ?pr1 =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, hf ==>[ α] hf)
  (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 hf)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ _ : αα •• ?pr1 =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, hf ==>[ α] hf)
         (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 hf),
 ?pr1 •• αα =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, hg ==>[ α] hg)
   (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 hg)) ?pr10

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g

hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y

 exact Hαα^-1.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
pr122 hg • (Hαα ^-1 ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ Hα ^-1) • pr122 hf
 abstract
          (use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite (pr2 αα) ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite vcomp_linv ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
αα
•• make_disp_map_bicat_cell Hαα ^-1
     (is_invertible_to_is_disp_invertible_subproof x y
        f g α Hα hx hy hf hg αα Hαα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, hf ==>[ α] hf)
  (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 hf)
 abstract
        (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply cellset_property | ] ; cbn ;
         rewrite transportb_disp_map_bicat_cell ; cbn ;
         apply vcomp_rinv).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
αα: hf ==>[ α] hg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ _ : αα
       •• make_disp_map_bicat_cell Hαα ^-1
            (is_invertible_to_is_disp_invertible_subproof
               x y f g α Hα hx hy hf hg αα Hαα) =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, hf ==>[ α] hf)
         (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 hf),
 make_disp_map_bicat_cell Hαα ^-1
   (is_invertible_to_is_disp_invertible_subproof x y f
      g α Hα hx hy hf hg αα Hαα) •• αα =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, hg ==>[ α] hg)
   (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 hg))
  (is_invertible_to_is_disp_invertible_subproof0 x y f
     g α Hα hx hy hf hg αα Hαα)
 abstract
        (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply cellset_property | ] ; cbn ;
         rewrite transportb_disp_map_bicat_cell ; cbn ;
         apply vcomp_linv).
  Defined.

hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏
x0 : ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg,
     is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ),
disp_map_disp_invertible_2cell_to_inv_2cell
  (disp_map_inv_2cell_to_disp_invertible_2cell x0) =
x0
 abstract
          (intro α ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏ y0 : disp_invertible_2cell γ hf hg,
disp_map_inv_2cell_to_disp_invertible_2cell
  (disp_map_disp_invertible_2cell_to_inv_2cell y0) =
y0
 abstract
          (intro α ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell | ] ;
           apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (**
   3. Local Univalence
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
 pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg)
≃ (∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ))

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
 pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg)
≃ (∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ))

D: arrow_subbicat B

f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
 pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg)
→ ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
isweq ?f

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
 pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg)
→ ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ)
 exact (λ α, ((pr11 α ,, pr2 α) ,, pr21 α)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
isweq
  (λ α : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
         pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
         (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
   (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ))
→ ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
  pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏
x0 : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
     pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
     (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
?g
  ((λ α : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
          pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
          (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
    (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α) x0) = x0
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏
y0 : ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg,
     is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ),
(λ α : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
       pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
       (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
 (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α) (?g y0) = y0

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
(∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg, is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ))
→ ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
  pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg
 exact (λ α, (pr11 α ,, pr2 α) ,, pr21 α).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏
x0 : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
     pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
     (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
(λ α : ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg,
       is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ),
 (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α)
  ((λ α : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
          pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
          (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
    (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α) x0) = x0
 intro ; apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell f g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
∏
y0 : ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg,
     is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ),
(λ α : ∑ γe : invertible_2cell (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg),
       pr122 hf • (γe ▹ pr12 hy) =
       (pr12 hx ◃ γ) • pr122 hg,
 (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α)
  ((λ α : ∑ hγ : hf ==>[ γ] hg,
          is_invertible_2cell (pr1 hγ),
    (pr11 α,, pr2 α),, pr21 α) y0) = y0
 intro ; apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
p: pr1 hf = pr1 hg
transportf
  (λ z : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) z
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (z · pr12 hy)) p
  (pr2 hf) = pr2 hg
≃ pr122 hf
  • (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg) p ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 hg

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
p: pr1 hf = pr1 hg
transportf
  (λ z : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) z
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (z · pr12 hy)) p
  (pr2 hf) = pr2 hg
≃ pr122 hf
  • (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 hf) (pr1 hg) p ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 hg

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hg: hx -->[ f] hy
p: pr1 (hf₁,, hf₂) = pr1 hg
transportf
  (λ z : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) z
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (z · pr12 hy)) p
  (pr2 (hf₁,, hf₂)) = pr2 hg
≃ pr122 (hf₁,, hf₂)
  • (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (hf₁,, hf₂)) (pr1 hg) p
     ▹ pr12 hy) = (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 hg

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hg₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hg₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hg₁ · pr12 hy)
p: pr1 (hf₁,, hf₂) = pr1 (hg₁,, hg₂)
transportf
  (λ z : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) z
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (z · pr12 hy)) p
  (pr2 (hf₁,, hf₂)) = pr2 (hg₁,, hg₂)
≃ pr122 (hf₁,, hf₂)
  • (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (hf₁,, hf₂)) (pr1 (hg₁,, hg₂)) p
     ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr122 (hg₁,, hg₂)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hg₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hg₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hg₁ · pr12 hy)
p: hf₁ = hg₁
transportf
  (λ z : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) z
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (z · pr12 hy)) p
  hf₂ = hg₂
≃ pr12 hf₂ • (idtoiso_2_1 hf₁ hg₁ p ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hf₂ = hg₂
≃ pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hf₂ = hg₂
→ pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
(pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂ → hf₂ = hg₂
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isaprop (hf₂ = hg₂)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isaprop
  (pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
   (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y

× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
hf₂ = hg₂
→ pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂

hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y

× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
p: hf₂ = hg₂

HD: arrow_subbicat_props D

× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hf₂

      apply idpath.

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
p: pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
p: pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂
pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
p: pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

          intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
p: pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂
pr12 hf₂ = pr12 hg₂

        exact p.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isaprop (hf₂ = hg₂)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y

hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isofhlevel 2 (pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁)

D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isofhlevel 2
  (invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isofhlevel 2 (pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isaprop (pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁)

        apply (pr2 HD).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isofhlevel 2
  (invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy))
 apply isaset_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_ob x
hy: disp_map_bicat_ob y
hf₁: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
hf₂, hg₂: pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) hf₁
× invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (hf₁ · pr12 hy)
isaprop
  (pr12 hf₂ • (id₂ hf₁ ▹ pr12 hy) =
   (pr12 hx ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 hg₂)
 apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: hx -->[ g] hy
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat p hf
     hg)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
     (idpath f) hf hg)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
  (idpath f) hf = hg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
    hf hg
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath f) hf hg

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
  (idpath f) hf = hg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
    hf hg
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
∏
x0 : pr1
       (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
          (idpath f) hf) = pr1 hg,
transportf
  (λ x1 : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
   pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) x1
   × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (x1 · pr12 hy)) x0
  (pr2
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
        (idpath f) hf)) = pr2 hg
≃ pr122 (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
           (idpath f) hf)
  • (make_weq
       (idtoiso_2_1
          (pr1
             (transportf
                (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
                (idpath f) hf)) (pr1 hg))
       (HB_2_1 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
          (pr1
             (transportf
                (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
                (idpath f) hf)) (pr1 hg)) x0 ▹ pr12 hy) =
  (pr12 hx ◃ idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) • pr122 hg

      exact (weq_on_fam HD _ _).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat y
hf, hg: hx -->[ f] hy
(disp_map_inv_2cell_weq_disp_invertible_2cell
   (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
   (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
      (idpath f) hf) hg
 ∘ refactor_weq (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
        (idpath f) hf) hg
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq
        (idtoiso_2_1
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
                 (idpath f) hf)) (pr1 hg))
        (HB_2_1 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
                 (idpath f) hf)) (pr1 hg)))
     (weq_on_fam HD
        (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
           (idpath f) hf) hg)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x0 : B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧,
      pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) x0
      × invertible_2cell (pr12 hx · f) (x0 · pr12 hy))
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, hx -->[ z] hy)
        (idpath f) hf) hg)%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath f) hf hg
 abstract
        (intro p ;
         induction p ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         cbn ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (**
   4. Adjoint equivalences
   *)
  Section AdjEquivToDispAdjEquiv.
    Context (HB : is_univalent_2 B)
            {x : B}
            {hx hy : disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x}
            (e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy))
            (com : invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)).

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
hx -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hy

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
hx -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hy

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) ?f
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell
  (pr12 hx · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (?f · pr12 hy)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
 exact e.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
pred_mor D (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy) e
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
left_adjoint_equivalence e
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
left_adjoint_equivalence e
 exact e.
        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
 exact com.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell
  (pr12 hx · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (e · pr12 hy)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
                 com).
    Defined.

    Local Notation "'L'" := adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_left_adj.

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
hy -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hx

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
hy -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hx

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
B ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hx ⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
pred_mor D (pr12 hy) (pr12 hx) ?f
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell
  (pr12 hy · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (?f · pr12 hx)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
B ⟦ pr1 hy, pr1 hx ⟧
 exact (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
pred_mor D (pr12 hy) (pr12 hx)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
einv:= inv_adjequiv e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hy) (pr1 hx)
pred_mor D (pr12 hy) (pr12 hx)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e)

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
einv:= inv_adjequiv e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hy) (pr1 hx)
left_adjoint_equivalence
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
einv:= inv_adjequiv e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hy) (pr1 hx)
invertible_2cell (pr12 hy)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e · pr12 hx)

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
einv:= inv_adjequiv e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hy) (pr1 hx)
left_adjoint_equivalence
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e)
 exact (pr2 einv).
        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
einv:= inv_adjequiv e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hy) (pr1 hx)
invertible_2cell (pr12 hy)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e · pr12 hx)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
                   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                         _
                         (left_equivalence_unit_iso einv))
                      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                            _
                            (inv_of_invertible_2cell com))))).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
invertible_2cell
  (pr12 hy · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e · pr12 hx)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((runitor (pr12 hy) • linvunitor (pr12 hy))
     • ((left_equivalence_counit_iso e) ^-1 ▹ pr12 hy))
    • rassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e) e
        (pr12 hy))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint e ◃ com ^-1))

        is_iso.
    Defined.

    Local Notation "'R'" := adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_right_adj.

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
pr122 (id_disp hx) • (left_adjoint_unit e ▹ pr12 hx) =
(pr12 hx
 ◃ left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
• pr122 (L ;; R)%mor_disp

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)

(pr12 hx

     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
• pr122 (L ;; R)%mor_disp

id₂ (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr12 hy · id₁ x)
• runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr12 hy) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr12 hy)

        apply id2_left.

HB: is_univalent_2 B

  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr12 hy)
      (id₁ x))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr12 hy)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr12 hy) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr12 hy)
(linvunitor (pr12 hy) ▹ id₁ x)
• (((((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr12 hy)
     • rassociator
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 e)) (pr1 e)
         (pr12 hy)) ▹ id₁ x)
   • (rassociator
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 e))
        (pr1 e · pr12 hy) (id₁ x)

              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr12 e))
              (pr1 e) (pr12 hy)
            • (left_adjoint_counit (pr12 e) ▹ pr12 hy))))) =
runitor (pr12 hy) • linvunitor (pr12 hy)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B

• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr12 hy) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr12 hy)
runitor (pr12 hy) • linvunitor (pr12 hy) =
runitor (pr12 hy) • linvunitor (pr12 hy)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
com: invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
R ;; L ==>[

  (left_adjoint_counit disp_adj_equiv_to_left_adj_data)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
left_equivalence_axioms
  disp_adj_equiv_to_left_adj_data
 exact disp_adj_equiv_to_left_equivalence_axioms.
    Defined.

    Definition disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
      : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)
      := (pr11 e ,, disp_adj_equiv_to_left_adj_equiv).

    Definition disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm
      : invertible_2cell
          (pr12 hx)
          (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv · pr12 hy)
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
           (pr221 e).

    Definition disp_map_bicat_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_pair
      : ∑ (e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)),
        invertible_2cell
          (pr12 hx)
          (e · pr12 hy)
      := disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
         ,,
         disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm.
  End DispAdjEquivToAdjEquiv.

disp_map_bicat_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_pair
  (disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB
     (pr1 z) (pr2 z)) = z

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
x0: hx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hy
is_univalent_2_1 B
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
x0: hx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hy
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

HD: arrow_subbicat_props D

z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
x0: hx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] hy
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact (pr2 HB).

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
pr1
  (disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB
     (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
     (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z)) = pr1 z

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_left_adj HB
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z) = pr1 z

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hy) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z),,
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z) = pr21 z

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hy) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z) = pr121 z
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z) = pr221 z

D: arrow_subbicat B

x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hy) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hy)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv z)
  (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z) = pr121 z
 apply HD.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B

HD: arrow_subbicat_props D

z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy

B: bicat

x: B
