B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z)) =
pr122 (pr1 z)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

        intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_comm z)) =
pr122 (pr1 z)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
runitor (pr12 hx) • (rinvunitor (pr12 hx) • pr221 z) =
pr122 (pr1 z)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
(runitor (pr12 hx) • rinvunitor (pr12 hx)) • pr221 z =
pr122 (pr1 z)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
z: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
id₂ (pr12 hx · id₁ x) • pr221 z = pr122 (pr1 z)

      apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
 invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy))
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
 invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy))
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy

HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
 invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy))
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isweq ?f

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
 invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy))
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
 exact (λ e, disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB (pr1 e) (pr2 e)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isweq
  (λ e : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
         invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
   disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB
     (pr1 e) (pr2 e))
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
→ ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
  invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
∏
x0 : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
     invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
?g
  ((λ e : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
          invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
    disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB
      (pr1 e) (pr2 e)) x0) = x0
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy,
(λ e : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
       invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
 disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB (pr1 e)
   (pr2 e)) (?g y) = y

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy
→ ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
  invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy)
 exact disp_map_bicat_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_pair.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
∏
x0 : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
     invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
disp_map_bicat_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_pair
  ((λ e : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
          invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
    disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB
      (pr1 e) (pr2 e)) x0) = x0
 exact (adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv HB).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) hx hy,
(λ e : ∑ e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy),
       invertible_2cell (pr12 hx) (e · pr12 hy),
 disp_map_bicat_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB (pr1 e)
   (pr2 e))
  (disp_map_bicat_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_pair y) =
y
 exact (disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv HB HD).
  Defined.

  (**
   5. Global univalence
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
p: pr1 hx = pr1 hy
transportf (λ z : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ z, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) p
  (pr2 hx) = pr2 hy
≃ invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy) p) · pr12 hy)

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
p: pr1 hx = pr1 hy
transportf (λ z : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ z, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) p
  (pr2 hx) = pr2 hy
≃ invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy) p) · pr12 hy)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
p: pr1 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃) = pr1 hy
transportf (λ z : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ z, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) p
  (pr2 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃)) = pr2 hy
≃ invertible_2cell (pr12 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃)) (pr1 hy) p)
     · pr12 hy)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₁: B
hy₂: B ⟦ hy₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
p: pr1 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃) = pr1 (hy₁,, hy₂,, hy₃)
transportf (λ z : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ z, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) p
  (pr2 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃)) = pr2 (hy₁,, hy₂,, hy₃)
≃ invertible_2cell (pr12 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (hx₁,, hx₂,, hx₃))
          (pr1 (hy₁,, hy₂,, hy₃)) p)
     · pr12 (hy₁,, hy₂,, hy₃))

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₁: B
hy₂: B ⟦ hy₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
p: hx₁ = hy₁
transportf (λ z : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ z, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) p
  (hx₂,, hx₃) = hy₂,, hy₃
≃ invertible_2cell hx₂
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 hx₁ hy₁ p) · hy₂)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
hx₂,, hx₃ = hy₂,, hy₃
≃ invertible_2cell hx₂ (id₁ hx₁ · hy₂)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
isaprop (pred_ob D (pr1 (hy₂,, hy₃)))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
pr1 (hx₂,, hx₃) = pr1 (hy₂,, hy₃)
≃ invertible_2cell hx₂ (id₁ hx₁ · hy₂)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
isaprop (pred_ob D (pr1 (hy₂,, hy₃)))
 apply HD.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x, hx₁: B
hx₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hx₃: pred_ob D hx₂
hy₂: B ⟦ hx₁, x ⟧
hy₃: pred_ob D hy₂
pr1 (hx₂,, hx₃) = pr1 (hy₂,, hy₃)
≃ invertible_2cell hx₂ (id₁ hx₁ · hy₂)
 exact (cod_1cell_path_help hx₂ hy₂
             ∘ make_weq
                 _
                 (HB_2_1 _ _ _ _))%weq.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
fiberwise_univalent_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
     (idpath x) hx hy)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
transportf (λ z : B, disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath x) hx = hy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) hx hy
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath x) hx hy

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
transportf (λ z : B, disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath x) hx = hy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) hx hy
 exact (adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hy
             ∘ weqtotal2
                 (make_weq _ (pr1 HB _ _))
                 (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD _ _)
             ∘ total2_paths_equiv _ _ _)%weq.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hy
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy))
        (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)))
     (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hy)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx hy)%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath x) hx hy
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
p: transportf
  (λ z : B, disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat z)
  (idpath x) hx = hy
(adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hy
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy))
        (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)))
     (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hy)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx hy)%weq
  p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath x) hx hy p

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx, hy: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
p: hx = hy
(adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hy
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy))
        (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hy)))
     (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hy)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx hy)%weq
  p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath x) hx hy p

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
(adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hx
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx))
        (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx)))
     (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hx)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx hx)%weq
  (idpath hx) =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
  (idpath x) hx hx (idpath hx)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B

pr1
  ((adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hx
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx))
           (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx)))
        (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hx)
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx
        hx)%weq (idpath hx)) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
     (idpath x) hx hx (idpath hx))

     (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)))

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
x0: hx -->[ idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)] hx
isaprop
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) x0)

 exact (pr2 HB).

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
pr1
  ((adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv HB HD hx hx
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx))
           (pr1 HB (pr1 hx) (pr1 hx)))
        (weq_fam_global (pr2 HB) HD hx hx)
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ x0 : B, ∑ h : B ⟦ x0, x ⟧, pred_ob D h) hx
        hx)%weq (idpath hx)) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
     (idpath x) hx hx (idpath hx))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_left_adj HB
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
make_disp_map_bicat_mor (id₁ x) (id₁ (pr1 hx))
  (id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hx) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hx)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))),,
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx),,
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hx) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hx)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
arrow_subbicat_contains_equiv_over_id HB D (pr1 hx)
  (pr1 hx) x (pr12 hx) (pr12 hx)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (pr1 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
id_pred_mor D (pr12 hx)
 apply HD.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx))) =
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
      is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx)))) =
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)))

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

          intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     ((id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)),,
      is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr12 hx))
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr12 hx)))) =
pr1
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 hx)))

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
runitor (pr12 hx)
• (id₂ (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)) =
runitor (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)

        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
x: B
hx: disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat x
runitor (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx) =
runitor (pr12 hx) • linvunitor (pr12 hx)

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
disp_univalent_2 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat

HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
is_univalent_2 B
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
arrow_subbicat_props D

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
is_univalent_2 B
 exact HB.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
arrow_subbicat_props D
 exact HD.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
arrow_subbicat_props D
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
is_univalent_2_1 B

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
arrow_subbicat_props D
 exact HD.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
HB: is_univalent_2 B
HD: arrow_subbicat_props D
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact (pr2 HB).
  Defined.
End ArrowSubBicatToDispBicat.

Definition cod_sfibs
           (B : bicat)
  : disp_bicat B
  := disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat (sfib_subbicat B).

Definition cod_sopfibs
           (B : bicat)
  : disp_bicat B
  := disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat (sopfib_subbicat B).
